segments.text: You have to do so much volume of activity that it would be unreasonable that you would suck. If you were to write out the equation of like, okay,
how many public speeches would I need to give for it to be unreasonable that I would suck? Is it 10? Is it 100? Is it a thousand? Write the number that you're
like, there's no way that I would suck after this many. And then all of your effort gets really narrowed to just doing that. And the key part of this is

not just to do the thousand, but after every 10 or every 20, looking at the top 10 or 20% and saying, "What did I do well there?" It's not just doing a 100 reachouts. So you have to do 100 re shots and then do more of what worked.
